title: rhododendron hirsutum f. microphyllum
intro: Rhododendron hirsutum f. microphyllum, also known as the small-leaved hirsute rhododendron, is a variety of the rhododendron plant that is native to the Himalayas and is characterized by its small leaves and hairy stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rhododendron hirsutum f. microphyllum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a tea or decoction, and can also be used in tinctures and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
